feed.description: Photography conversations: craft, storytelling, workflow, and making images under real constraints.
feed.title: Frame & Light

bullets: Welcome back to Frame & Light. Today we're talking about documentary photography, and I'm joined by Tarek Hassan, documentary photographer. Tarek Hassan, thanks for being here.
Before we get into it — Ava Lemoyne was on last week talking about strobe positioning underwater.
Yeah, exactly. And it ties into what we're covering today.
summary.raw_text: Welcome back to Frame & Light. Today we're talking about documentary photography, and I'm joined by Tarek Hassan, documentary photographer. Tarek Hassan, thanks for being here.
summary.title: Documentary Workflow in the Field
